content.full_text:
THE WESTERN PACIFIC RAILROAD COMPANY
WESTERN PACIFIC BUILDING, 526 MISSION STREET
SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94105
TELEPHONE: 415-982-2100

WALTER G. TREAVOR                                 KATHERINE M. GRIFFIN
VICE PRESIDENT-LAW                                MICHAEL P. HEARNEY
                                                  EUGENE J. TOLER
                                                  ATTORNEYS

                                        June 22, 1976

                                        File:  3535-27

Mr. Ted Prim
Staff Counsel
Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804

Dear Mr. Prim:

     This letter will confirm our telephone conversa-
tion yesterday with respect to your letter of June 11,
1976 to Mr. Robert Welk of the Santa Fe Railway advising
him that the dues paid to the California Railroad Associa-
tion are not reportable on reports filed pursuant to
Section 86108.  Western Pacific Railroad Company is one
of the five dues-paying members of the California Rail-
road Association referred to in your letter, and accor-
ingly your advice to the Santa Fe is applicable to
Western Pacific.

     Thank you for your assistance.

                                        Yours very truly,

                                        Katherine M. Griffin

KMG:pra

The image appears to be mostly blank or extremely faint, with only a few barely visible marks at the top and bottom of the page. I cannot reliably transcribe any legible text from this document.

[illegible]
